title: Reading Comprehension: Everyday Texts
description: Read short A2 texts — notices, emails, simple stories — and answer comprehension questions using skim (main idea), scan (find a detail) and context-clue strategies for unknown words.
sources: CEFR A2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Cambridge English, Prepare! Level 3 A2/B1 (reading strategies: skimming, scanning, context clues)
